heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 150512 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15051236:412., .Apr. 3, 1952, ch. 131, § 1266 Stat. 40
